summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Liquidity Engine — Market Mechanics Layer. All 9 tests passed with 100% success rate. Liquidity detection matches expected manual test results exactly (3 EQH, 2 EQL, 5 pools, 5 sweeps).

Liquidity object present with equal_highs, equal_lows, pools, sweeps fields

Equal lows structure validation (2 EQL detected with price, touches, strength)
Liquidity pools structure validation (5 pools: 3 BSL, 2 SSL with active/taken status)
Sweeps detection (5 sweeps with bullish/bearish direction, pool_price, description)
Sweep validation logic (wick through + close back = valid sweep, 5/5 valid sweeps)
Manual test comparison (exact match: 3 EQH, 2 EQL, 5 pools, 5 sweeps)
BSL @ 90420 with 4 touches found (90419.99 price match)
SSL @ 89229 with 2 touches found (89228.99 price match)
